common.no_data: No data for the selected criteria.

topbar.title: WT META Center
topbar.report_title: Report a bug or data issue on GitHub

meta_tab.info: {n} vehicles · BR {min}–{max} · {mode} · click row for details
meta_tab.tip_click: Click any row to open the vehicle card.

redbook_tab.title: Red Book
redbook_tab.description: Vehicles with the fewest battles played — they are going extinct.

brackets_tab.description: Weighted META SCORE by nation and BR bracket
brackets_tab.no_data: No data for the selected filters.
brackets_tab.tip_desc: Weighted average META SCORE per nation and BR bracket. Higher = stronger nation at that BR range.

farm_tab.gems_empty: No gems in -2.0 BR range with Farm Score above anchor.
farm_tab.no_anchor: No anchor vehicle found at this BR with the current filters.
farm_tab.tip_desc: Finds the best farming lineup for a chosen BR. Select a nation and vehicle type, then click Calculate.
farm_tab.tip_anchor: Highest Farm Score vehicle at the target BR.
farm_tab.tip_gems: Lower-BR vehicles that still beat the anchor's Farm Score.

progression_tab.info: {n} vehicles in tree · sorted by research rank
progression_tab.no_data: No tech tree data for this nation. Make sure build_data.py exports vdb_shop_rank.
progression_tab.tip_must: Top META score in its era
progression_tab.tip_fill: Needed to fill your lineup slots
progression_tab.tip_skip: Better option exists at this tier
progression_tab.tip_lineup: Lineup Mix controls how many slots per type are expected when assigning verdicts.

cost_tab.tip_desc: Total cost to research the full tech tree per nation and branch. Only Standard vehicles unless otherwise selected.
cost_tab.tip_bars: Each bar = total RP or SL. Segments = individual eras.
cost_tab.tip_eras: Darker color = higher era. Hover a segment for breakdown.

disclaimer.title: Data Disclaimer
disclaimer.body_1: WT META Center is an independent community tool. Statistics are based on community-aggregated gameplay data. Vehicle characteristics and progression data are sourced from the publicly available War Thunder Datamine project using Sgambe33/WT-Vehicle-Data-Extract tool. Scores (META, FARM) are calculated estimates produced by custom statistical models — they are approximations, not ground truth.
disclaimer.body_2: Data may be outdated, incomplete, or statistically biased due to sample size, game patches, or collection methodology. Use this tool for reference and entertainment purposes only.
disclaimer.legal: This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Gaijin Entertainment in any way.'War Thunder' is a trademark of Gaijin Entertainment. By continuing, you accept that all information is provided 'as-is' without any warranty.
disclaimer.note: This notice is shown once. You can revisit the source code at any time.
